ast.name: addOption
ast.source: OmniFocus plug-in (macOS, install required, prompts once)
ast.target: OmniFocus 插件（macOS，需安装，仅提示一次）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Comma-separated OmniFocus tags applied to every sent task. Frontmatter override takes precedence.
ast.target: 应用于每个已发送任务的逗号分隔 OmniFocus 标签。前置元数据覆盖优先。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: OmniFocus project name. Leave blank to send to inbox. Frontmatter override takes precedence.
ast.target: OmniFocus 项目名称。留空则发送到收件箱。前置元数据覆盖优先。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: YAML frontmatter key on a note that overrides default tags. Accepts a list or a comma-separated string.
ast.target: 笔记上的 YAML 前置元数据键，用于覆盖默认标签。接受列表或逗号分隔的字符串。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: YAML frontmatter key on a note that overrides the default project.
ast.target: 笔记上的 YAML 前置元数据键，用于覆盖默认项目。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Save tasks straight to their destination instead of opening the Quick Entry window for each one. No effect in OmniAutomation or Plug-in mode (Quick Entry is never opened there).
ast.target: 将任务直接保存到其目标位置，而不是为每个任务打开快速输入窗口。在 OmniAutomation 或插件模式下无效（那里从不打开快速输入）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When on, nested checkboxes become subtasks in OmniFocus instead of being folded into the parent task's note. True subtasks require OmniAutomation or Plug-in send mode (macOS); URL scheme mode falls back to today's body-folding behavior.
ast.target: 开启时，嵌套复选框在 OmniFocus 中将成为子任务，而不是折叠到父任务的笔记中。真正的子任务需要 OmniAutomation 或插件发送模式（macOS）；URL 方案模式会回退到当天的正文折叠行为。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, #tags written on the task line are added as OmniFocus tags (combined with default/frontmatter tags).
ast.target: 启用后，任务行上写的 #标签 将作为 OmniFocus 标签添加（与默认/前置元数据标签合并）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If this plugin is useful to you, you can buy me a coffee. Thanks!
ast.target: 如果这个插件对您有用，您可以请我喝杯咖啡。谢谢！

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 跳过 OmniFocus 快速输入

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No uncompleted tasks in this note.
ast.target: 此笔记中没有未完成的任务。

ast.name: name
ast.target: 将未完成的任务发送到 OmniFocus

ast.name: name
ast.source: Send task at cursor to OmniFocus
ast.target: 将光标处的任务发送到 OmniFocus

ast.name: name
ast.target: 将选定的任务发送到 OmniFocus

ast.name: name
ast.target: 标记所有任务完成（不发送）
